use futures::future::FutureExt;
use tokio::pin;
use tokio::select;

async fn run_loop(rx: &mut tokio::sync::mpsc::Receiver<Msg>, interval: &mut tokio::time::Interval) {
    loop {
        let recv_fut = rx.recv().fuse();
        let tick_fut = interval.tick().fuse();
        pin!(recv_fut);
        pin!(tick_fut);
        select! {
            Some(m) = recv_fut => {
                handle_message(m).await;
            }
            _ = tick_fut => {
                heartbeat().await;
            }
            else => break,
        }
    }
}

async fn handle_message(_msg: Msg) { todo!() }
async fn heartbeat() { todo!() }
enum Msg { Ping, Shutdown }
